chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The silence and preservation of the tongue

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (218/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (218/ 8)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَجَاةُ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِي حِفْظِ لِسَانِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Al Halby, raising it,
‘Heasws said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The salvation of a ‘Momin’ (the Believer) lies in preservation of his tongue’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from al- Halabi in a marfu’ manner from the Messenger of Allah who has said the following: “The salvation of a believer is in his controlling his tongue.”
